title: Jharkhand JAC JHTET 2026 Online Form for Primary and Junior Level
short_information: Jharkhand Academic Council has released the Jharkhand Teacher Eligibility Test JHTET 2026 Notification 2026. Those Candidates are Interested to the Following Exam Can Apply Online From 21/04/2026 to 02/06/2026.candidates should read the JAC JHTET 2026 information brochure for all the information related to the JHTET exam like syllabus, eligibility, age limit, fees, Primary and Junior Level, information and other types of information and then apply. Jharkhand Academic Council, Ranchi Jharkhand Teacher Eligibility Test (JHTET 2026) Online Form JAC TET 2026 Exam : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: For Paper I or Paper II Only General / BC / EWS: 1300/- SC / ST : 700/- For Both Paper (Junior / Primary) General / BC / EWS: 1500/- SC / ST : 800/- Pay the Examination Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking or Offline Fee Mode Only. Jharkhand JHTET 2026 Exam :

rows: 10+2 Intermediate Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in final year of 2- year Diploma in Elementary Education (B.T.C./D.El.Ed. 10+2 Intermediate Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 45% marks and passed or appearing in final year of 2- year Diploma in Elementary Education (B.T.C./D.El.Ed.), in accordance with the NCTE (Recognition Norms and Procedure), Regulations, 2002 10+2 Intermediate Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in final year of 4- year Bachelor of Elementary Education (B.El.Ed.) Intermediate 10+2 Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in final year of 2- year Diploma in Education (Special Education.) Bachelor Degree (or its equivalent) and passed or appearing in final year of two year Diploma in Elementary Education (B.T.C./DELED. More Eligibility Details Read the Notification

Bachelor Degree (or its equivalent) and passed or appearing in final year of 2-Year Diploma in Elementary Education (B.T.C./ D.El.Ed.) Bachelor Degree (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in final year of Bachelor in Education (B.Ed/L.T./Shiksha Shastri (Regular) Bachelor Degree (or its equivalent) with at least 45% marks and passed or appearing in final year of Bachelor in Education (B.Ed/L.T./Shiksha Shastri (Regular)), in accordance with the NCTE (Recognition Norms and Procedure) Regulations issued from time to time in this regard. 10+2 Intermediate / Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in final year of 4- year Bachelor of Elementary Education (B.El.Ed) 10+2 Intermediate / Senior Secondary (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in final year of 4- year B.A/B.Sc.Ed or B.A.Ed/B.Sc.Ed. Bachelor Degree (or its equivalent) with at least 50% marks and passed or appearing in final year of B.Ed. (Special Education) Master Degree with 55% Marks and 3 Year Integrated B.Ed-M.Ed Course.
